title: myristica johnsii
intro: Myristica johnsii, also known as Indian nutmeg or fragrant nutmeg, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myristicaceae. The medicinal properties of M. johnsii include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of M. johnsii include its potential to aid digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. M. johnsii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote overall well-being.
